message.content:
@startuml
participant "Personnage" as P
participant "Aventure" as A
participant "ComportementArme" as C

P <<Actor>>
P : combattre()
P : setArme(ComportementArme)

A : void main(String)

C : void utiliserArme()

P <|-- C : "Troll"
P <|-- C : "Roi"
P <|-- C : "Reine"
P <|-- C : "Chevalier"

C <|-- "ComportementPoignard"
C <|-- "ComportementEpee"
C <|-- "ComportementArc"

@enduml
